summary: Successfully tested AI Core overlay functionality. All major features working correctly - button visibility issue from iteration 23 has been resolved. AI Core button is now clearly visible with proper styling, overlay opens correctly, shows 4 daily brief items, message sending/receiving works with keyword-matching responses, and close functionality works properly.
passed_tests: AI Core button is visible and clickable with proper inset-material styling
Button opens AI Core overlay when clicked
Overlay displays 'System Intelligence' header with 'CORE ACTIVE' subtitle
Daily brief section shows exactly 4 items as expected
Revenue status: 'Revenue up 12% this month' with green trending icon
Invoice warning: '3 invoices overdue — £2,400 outstanding' with warning icon
VAT alert: 'VAT return due in 5 days' with red alert icon
Project update: 'Kitchen Renovation at 72% — on track' with lightning icon
Message input field accepts text input
System responds with appropriate keyword-matched responses
AI response for 'revenue' query returned relevant information about £24,500 and 12% increase
User and system messages display correctly in conversation thread
Close button (X) successfully closes the overlay
Dashboard layout remains intact after closing overlay
All data-testid attributes present and functional for testing
success_percentage: Frontend: 100% - All AI Core functionality working as expected
